content_themes: What to expect at your first session

seasonal_promos.mothers_day: Mom's Body Reset — Postpartum sculpting series
seasonal_promos.summer: Summer Body Prep — 6-session package (start now, ready by June)
seasonal_promos.holiday: New Body New Year — January sculpting series pre-sale
seasonal_promos.new_year: New Year Sculpt — 40% off your first 3-session package

client_psychology: Clients are motivated by visible, measurable results — inches lost, photos that show change. Many have tried diet and exercise without getting the results they want in specific areas. They need reassurance that non-surgical methods actually work. GLP-1 weight loss patients are a growing segment — they've lost weight but have loose skin. Package deals (6-10 sessions) are the standard because results are cumulative. Show measurements and photos to build trust.
